category_sources: official EMQX docs describe EMQX as a distributed MQTT broker and messaging platform for IoT.
display_name_sources: official documentation and GitHub repository use EMQX as the product name.
docs_sources: official dedicated documentation domain provides EMQX docs; official GitHub README links to the self-hosted docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/emqx/emqx, so repo is not re-determined.
tags_sources: official GitHub README and docs describe MQTT broker, IoT, messaging, pub/sub, and Erlang implementation context.
